summary: v109 adds `BoundedComplexCategory.homotopyQuotientBounded`, `boundedHomotopyExactWeakEquivalenceToBoundedExactAcyclicHomotopy_trW`, `BoundedHomotopyDerivedCategory.boundedVerdierComparison`, `BoundedHomotopyDerivedCategory.boundedVerdierComparisonLocalizationIso`, and `BoundedHomotopyDerivedCategory.boundedVerdierComparison_comp_ambientIso`. The homotopy/Verdier pullback localization now factors through the bounded homotopy Verdier quotient, and composing that comparison with the bounded-to-ambient comparison recovers the existing ambient ordinary Verdier comparison. Product remains nonterminal because closed2 hypotheses are not proved unconditionally, homotopy/direct left-right calculus is not unconditional, ordinary triangulated structure is not transferred to `Dbounded`, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
